name: Bourbon Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate chips and sweetened condensed milk in a large bowl and cover loosely.
2. Cook in the microwave for 3 minutes on High.
3. Remove from the microwave and stir until smooth. Add the bourbon and orange extract; mix well.
4. Grease an 8-inch square pan and sprinkle the bottom of the pan with almonds.
5. Pour the mixture into the pan; let stand until firm or chill in the refrigerator.
